calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Dec-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to December 03, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2024 Continued To Oct-01-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiffs are sanctioned $400.00 each for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 01, 2024, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Continued To Jul-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
